•  

    Oppenheimer (Blu-ray 4K) (2023)


    The World Forever Changes.

    Director: Christopher Nolan

    OVERALL: Draw

    Blu-ray ALL America - Universal Pictures [2023]
    Blu-ray ALL Japan - Universal Pictures [2024]

  •  

    Blu-ray ALL America - Universal Pictures [2023 Release]

  • Extras:
    DISC ONE (Blu-ray 4K)
    * The Film

    DISC TWO (Blu-ray)
    * The Film

    DISC THREE (Blu-ray)
    "To End All War: Oppenheimer & the Atomic Bomb" 2023 documentary (87:18)
    "The Story of Our Time: The Making of Oppenheimer" 2023 documentary (Play All - 72:25):
    - "Now I Am Become Death" (7:17)
    - "The Luminaries" (11:27)
    - "The Manhattan Project" (16:41)
    - "The Devil of the Details" (17:21)
    - "Walking a Mile" (6:28)
    - "Can You Hear the Music?" (6:48)
    - "We Can Perform This Miracle" (6:49)
    "Meet the Press Q&A Panel: Oppenheimer" 2023 interviews (34:46) [1080i/60]
    "Innovations in Film: 65mm Black-and-White Film in Oppenheimer" 2023 featurette (8:21)
    Trailers (Play All - 14:11):
    - Teaser (1:11)
    - Trailer 2 (2:04)
    - Trailer 3 (3:11)
    - IMAX Exclusive Trailer (2:40)
    - Opening Look (5:07)
  • Subtitles:
    English HoH, French (Canadian), Spanish (Latin)

  • Have you spotted a mistake in these specifications? If so, let us know via our forums.
  •  

    Blu-ray ALL Japan - Universal Pictures [2024 Release]

    DISC ONE (Blu-ray 4K)

    * The Film
